overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring Tom's Diner. The player walks from the neon-lit front counter through a doorway into a green-lit back kitchen, loots items, and returns to the front area where an NPC cook works behind the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro diner entrance and counter aisle

agents.ego_description: walking through the diner entrance toward the back kitchen door, passing the neon sign and display cases

notable_agents.action: cook standing behind the counter facing the grill area

entered.detail: large circular red neon sign with white lettering mounted on the wall
black and white checkered tile pattern at the diner entrance
tall glass cabinet with dark frame containing items
blue cylindrical trash receptacle near the entrance
long counter with green front panel and stools
metal rail running along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the front of Tom's Diner, passing a glowing red neon sign and checkered floor. The camera walks down the narrow aisle between the counter and display case, approaching a cook working near the back doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial kitchen prep area with industrial shelving

events.description: passes through doorway from warm front diner into green-lit back kitchen
interacts with lootable items on the counter, collecting Chromanticore Lime and Corpse Cola

agents.ego_description: searching the back kitchen area, examining metal shelves and looting items from the prep counter

entered.detail: industrial metal shelving unit with multiple tiers against the wall
large cardboard box with orange 'ALL FOODS' logo on the side
stainless steel prep counter with various kitchen items
large metal barrel or drum near the right wall
harsh green fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling
window with metal blinds showing the outside street

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow back kitchen illuminated by harsh green fluorescent lights. The player explores the industrial prep area, examining metal shelving and a cardboard box labeled 'ALL FOODS', then interacts with lootable items on the counter before turning back toward the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner service counter with street view

events.description: exits the green kitchen back into the warm-lit front diner area

agents.ego_description: returning to the front counter area and approaching the service station near the cook

notable_agents.action: cook working behind the counter preparing food
person in pink jacket visible through the front window

entered.detail: doorway frame viewed from the kitchen side leading back to the diner
warm amber track lighting hanging from the ceiling above the counter
bottles of sauces and condiments on a side table
large window showing the neon-lit street outside
round cushioned stools with red trim along the counter
menu display hanging above the counter area

segments.scene_description: The player exits the kitchen doorway back into the warm amber lighting of the front diner. The camera approaches the service counter where the cook continues working, with hanging track lights above, condiment bottles on the side, and a view of the neon-lit street visible through the front windows where a person in pink stands outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the warm, neon-lit atmosphere of a diner into a sterile industrial kitchen before returning to the main service area. It begins by gliding past a glowing red neon sign and across a checkered floor, moving down a narrow aisle toward a cook positioned near a back doorway. As the camera passes through the door, the environment shifts abruptly to a back kitchen bathed in harsh green fluorescent light, where the view lingers on metal shelving and a cardboard box labeled ALL FOODS. The scene then transitions back through the doorway, returning to the amber glow of the front diner and its hanging track lights. Finally, the camera approaches the service counter and condiment bottles, revealing a view through the front windows of a neon-lit street where a person in pink stands outside.
